RT @paranoidream: https://t.co/afhvbJsfZa
原作者：https://t.co/PanCgJW9jK

GPT Image 2 Prompt:

Create a children’s picture book interior page in a vertical format, with a warm off-white paper background and a multi-panel storybook layout.
Use a hand-drawn children’s book illustration style with soft gouache, colored pencil, and crayon textures, visible https://t.co/fRsH4id1jj

一页儿童绘本内页插画，竖版构图，米白色纸张背景，多段式分镜布局。
风格为手绘儿童绘本风格，柔和水粉、彩铅、蜡笔质感，纸张颗粒，线条自然，角色圆润可爱。
页面里加入清晰可读的绘本文字，像真实绘本一样排版，重点词可用彩色高亮，并加入少量手绘装饰。

故事内容：
奥特曼大战葫芦娃，可以多页 https://t.co/IFxbG0MTwf

Poems that ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini all seem to "like" when you ask for poetry related to being/making LLMs:
Rilke's "Archaic Torso of Apollo"
Stevens' "Idea of Order at Key West"
Borges's "The Golem" (or "The Other Tiger")
Pessoa's "Autopsychography"

Pretty apt choices! https://t.co/nqDgCyXgNa
The Golem is a little too on the nose, though.

This is a very niche post, but they are good poems. I hadn't read Autopsychography until  it came up from both Claude and Gemini.

And if you haven't read Rilke, that poem, with its incredible end, is a good intro, (the models all LOVE Rilke - the 8th Elegy is a real favorite)
Claude's thought trace on one such request - super interesting. https://t.co/DgM2N25H28

一天一个版本，Open Design v0.3.0 上线 🚀

39 个 PR、25 位贡献者、24h 再一波💥

- 🐾 codex 同款 pets 正式集成
- 支持 @cognition Devin for Terminal + @MistralAI Vibe CLI
- 阿拉伯语 RTL、法语 🌍

感谢大家持续支持！

Open Design sekarang mendukung Bahasa Indonesia! 🇮🇩

Terima kasih @aqilaziz untuk kontribusi yang luar biasa 🙌 Mari bersama-sama membangun tools yang lebih baik ✨

https://t.co/7fuhR3IQ5a https://t.co/TaTRKAToZG
https://t.co/7fuhR3IQ5a ❤️ 🇮🇩

We open-sourced Cursor's Kanban mode ！！💥🚀

Plus 10+ agents running locally: Claude Code, Codex, Devin, Hermes, OpenCode.

Try open-source Claude Design → https://t.co/7fuhR3IQ5a https://t.co/Y01tmifeFu

Hermes on Kanban — nice! ✨ Btw it also runs in our open-source Kanban alongside Claude Code, Codex, Devin & more. 🔥

Try open-source Claude Design → https://t.co/7fuhR3IQ5a 

https://t.co/if2brZe0OJ

Agent 看板模式太火了🔥

正式开源 Open Design 看板模式 💥 

你现在可以在一处编排 Hermes Agent、Cursor、 @DevinAI ，实时预览运行状态，并行设计多个原型🚀

https://t.co/if2brZe0OJ
访问 https://t.co/zeAjgNJvG2

RT @Pixelxzen: @tuturetom @DevinAI 我也来给OpenDesign助助力！已经提交Pr了。
https://t.co/XcHnj7fi3d

又是一次历史时刻 💥

open design 从 10k 到 20k，只用了 60 小时！

107 个 PR、56 位贡献者、来自 17 个国家 🌍

v0.2.0 和 v0.3.0 连发，感谢每一位朋友的支持和贡献！让我们一起继续把 open design 变得更好 🚀

RT @mylifcc: Open Design 看板模式正式开源了！ 🔥
现在可以在一处同时编排 Hermes Agent、Cursor、DevinAI，实时预览运行状态，还能并行设计多个原型。
这波更新真的把“AI 开发体验”拉到新高度了。
每个 feature 都这么懂开…

欢迎体验，Open Design 正式开源看板模式🔥

你现在可以操纵你的 Hermes agent，Devin，Openclaw，Claude code 和 Codex 做并行设计原型探索或者做 PPT💥

https://t.co/crFa2JgyaV

Local-first. BYOK at every layer.
